blocking_issues: The six workflow success criteria are referenced but not expanded inside the plan artifact.
The stable role order and provider priority are not explicitly described as final tie-breakers.
The concrete module containing ROLE_QUALITY_BANDS is not named.
required_changes: Expand the six contract criteria in the plan.
Clarify the complete lexicographic ordering and final tie-breakers.
Name smart_llm_router/router.py as the role-band source.
test_gaps: Stable role order and provider priority when every higher-priority key ties.
cost_risks: Strict fail-closed behavior can reduce availability when every qualified route is cooled or unavailable.
A cost-first choice among quality-qualified routes may trade away latency or extra quality; this must remain an explicit policy decision.
